purpose: Optimized FoxPay UI sprites generated from UIGAME.png, uigame2.png, packs.png and card.png.

sheets.uigame-sheet.webp: Half-size reference sheet of neon buttons, bars, task cards and icons.
sheets.uigame-transparent-sheet.webp: Half-size transparent component sheet with banners, cards, buttons, avatar and snowflake.

sprites.wide-task-card.webp: Large dark blue card with icon/button areas.
sprites.medium-task-card.webp: Compact dark blue card with icon/button areas.
sprites.paw-badge.webp: Paw badge for low tier packs.
sprites.fox-hex-badge.webp: Fox badge for mid tier packs.
sprites.fox-diamond-badge.webp: Fox diamond badge for higher tier packs.
sprites.fox-crown-wreath.webp: Crown fox badge for premium packs.
sprites.task-card.webp: Standalone original card.png converted to WebP.
